headline: How The Avery Dennison (AVY) Investment Narrative Is Evolving Without New Analyst Commentary
summary: Avery Dennison’s current analyst price targets remain unchanged, with no revisions reported in this latest update. headline: A Fresh Look At Avery Dennison (AVY) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Performance
summary: Recent performance and current snapshot Avery Dennison (AVY) has seen mixed share performance recently, with the stock up 4.1% over the past day and 1.5% over the past week, but down over the past month and the past 3 months. Year to date, the stock is down 12.7%, with a total return decline of 9.5% over the past year and a slight gain of 0.3% across 3 years, while the 5-year total return shows an 18.9% decline. headline: Avery Dennison (AVY) Draws Lower Target from Argus amid Tariff Concerns
summary: With a TTM operating cash flow of $1.03 billion, Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) is included among the 12 Cash-Rich Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 4, Argus lowered its price recommendation on Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) to $175 from $190. It reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. The firm said the company’s new RFID […]
